ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm type */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., LAP3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "implementation_language" TEXT /* Programming language used for implementation */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the algorithm's repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem instance */,
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complexity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Detailed statement of the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_complexity_id FOREIGN KEY ("complexity_id") REFERENCES problem_complexities ("complexity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem instance */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the instance belongs to */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem instance */,
  "instance_description" TEXT /* Description of the problem instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instances_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance the algorithm was run on */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was run */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time the algorithm was run */,
  "machine_specifications" TEXT /* Machine specifications used for the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric type */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES performance_metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter type */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., b, samples_region) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_parameter_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_type_id") REFERENCES parameter_types ("parameter_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_complexities" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity level */,
  "complexity_level" INTEGER /* Level of complexity (e.g., 12) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complexity level */,
  "complexity_category" TEXT /* Category of complexity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm type (e.g., Local Authority Problem) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of algorithm type (e.g., optimization, sorting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric type (e.g., reward, samples) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric type */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "parameter_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "parameter_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type (e.g., b, samples_region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_problem_instances" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "problem_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance */,
  "problem_instance_description" TEXT /* Description of the problem instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_problem_instances_problem_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_problem_instances_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
